name: Raisin Bread for Bread Machines
recipeInstructions:
1. At the beep, add 3/4 cup Raisins.
2. Variation: Cinnamon Raisin - Add 1 tablespoon Cinnamon.
3. Variation: Apricot Bread - Add 3/4 cup Dried diced apricots.
4. Variation: Mixed Dried Fruit - Add 3/4 cup Dried mixed fruit, diced.
5. Variation: Orange Raisin - Add 3/4 cup Raisins and 1/2 teaspoon Grated orange peel.
Note: This recipe yields 6 servings for a Large (1.5 lb) loaf. For medium loaves, use 4 portions; for small loaves, use 3 portions.
Combine all ingredients except raisins in the bread machine according to the manufacturer's instructions—typically using a "Mix" or "Fruit" setting for fruit breads. The machine will beep when it's time to add the raisins. Add the raisins at the designated time. Use one of the variations instead of raisins, adding them at the same step.
